methodology_note: Fundamental score uses TRAILING reported growth (latest quarter YoY, date-aligned), not forward projections - forward analyst estimates are not freely available for this universe and are never fabricated. Hard filters: EQ series only, avg 20d turnover >= Rs 3 cr, price above 200 DMA. Trade plans are ATR/structure-derived levels with volume-state entry validity, not advice.
